a:r.a:t: The fact that I could leave without giving them everything and still come back is the moment I started trusting this.
Path B existed; she’d close the tablet without it
“Tried more than 3 things” acknowledged her reality
Persistent matches across sessions felt safe
DNAvisit screen: would close the tablet without Linda
HIPAA page alone (small text, legal, hospital systems)
The word “upgrade” feels like a phone plan
No phone number anywhere on the marketing surface
No hospital affiliation or doctor name visible
Required to know which hospital systems hold records
Caregiver-mode is a structural feature gap
Daughter Linda taps, reads legal, picks the password
Used Linda’s email: “but then it’s not really my account”
No voice or audio option for content delivery
Emails surfacing options she already tried and failed
Any flow that requires her to act without Linda
Generic patient-portal tone toward refractory patients
Anonymized stories with no Nebraska or rural voices
